content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. 1. **Header Information**: * Top left: "TPS562200, TPS563200" * Top left (below model numbers): "SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023" * Top right: Texas Instruments logo and website "www.ti.com" 2. **Title**: "5 Pin Configuration and Functions" 3. **Diagram**: A pinout diagram of a 6-pin package. * Pin 1: GND * Pin 2: SW * Pin 3: VIN * Pin 4: VFB * Pin 5: EN * Pin 6: VBST 4. **Figure Caption**: "Figure 5-1. DDC Package 6 Pin (SOT) Top View" 5. **Table Caption**: "Table 5-1. Pin Functions" 6. **Table**: * Columns: PIN (split into NAME and NUMBER), DESCRIPTION * Row 1: GND, 1, Ground pin Source terminal of low-side power NFET as well as the ground terminal for controller circuit. Connect sensitive VFB to this GND at a single point. * Row 2: SW, 2, Switch node connection between high-side NFET and low-side NFET. * Row 3: VIN, 3, Input voltage supply pin. The drain terminal of high-side power NFET. * Row 4: VFB, 4, Converter feedback input. Connect to output voltage with feedback resistor divider. * Row 5: EN, 5, Enable input control. Active high and must be pulled up to enable the device. * Row 6: VBST, 6, Supply input for the high-side NFET gate drive circuit. Connect a 0.1µF capacitor between VBST and SW pins. 7. **Footer**: * Page number: 4 * Link: "Submit Document Feedback" * Copyright: "Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated" * Product Folder Links: "TPS562200 TPS563200" Now I will format this into the requested JSON structure. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 56, 253, 69], "category": "header", "text": "TPS562200, TPS563200"}, {"bbox": [85, 69, 362, 81], "category": "header", "text": "SLVSCB0E – JANUARY 2014 – REVISED MAY 2023"}, {"bbox": [751, 34, 913, 80], "category": "header", "text": "TEXAS INSTRUMENTS\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [89, 96, 414, 114], "category": "title", "text": "5 Pin Configuration and Functions"}, {"bbox": [374, 121, 625, 239], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [316, 248, 682, 264], "category": "figure_caption", "text": "Figure 5-1. DDC Package 6 Pin (SOT) Top View"}, {"bbox": [404, 276, 595, 290], "category": "table_caption", "text": "Table 5-1. Pin Functions"}, {"bbox": [90, 290, 906, 457], "category": "table", "text": "
PINDESCRIPTION
NAMENUMBER
GND1Ground pin Source terminal of low-side power NFET as well as the ground terminal for controller circuit. Connect sensitive VFB to this GND at a single point.
SW2Switch node connection between high-side NFET and low-side NFET.
VIN3Input voltage supply pin. The drain terminal of high-side power NFET.
VFB4Converter feedback input. Connect to output voltage with feedback resistor divider.
EN5Enable input control. Active high and must be pulled up to enable the device.
VBST6Supply input for the high-side NFET gate drive circuit. Connect a 0.1µF capacitor between VBST and SW pins.
"}, {"bbox": [86, 951, 96, 962], "category": "footer", "text": "4"}, {"bbox": [128, 951, 296, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Submit Document Feedback"}, {"bbox": [657, 950, 913, 962], "category": "footer", "text": "Copyright © 2023 Texas Instruments Incorporated"}, {"bbox": [363, 975, 636, 988], "category": "footer", "text": "Product Folder Links: TPS562200 TPS563200"}] ```
